hypothesis: Including xTB-derived local electronic descriptors (e.g., spin magnetic moments, metal-centered d-orbital Mulliken populations, and ligand-field geometry metrics) in the Δ-learning XGBoost model will reduce the HSE06 band-gap MAE by at least 25% for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni relative to a model using only ST-135, RACs, and APRDF features.
